responsiveFixes: ProjectsSection: bottom-32 → bottom-20 progress bar (clears HudFrame at heights <820px); desktop visual maxWidth 460px → min(380px,42vh); pinned stage h-screen → h-[100svh]; minHeight 100vh → 100svh; nav dot hit area 32px → 44px (touch target); section-04 background number switched to clamp(6rem,12vw,14rem)

HeroSection: HeroWarrior container md:block → lg:block (was colliding with headline at 768-1023px); md:grid-cols-12 → lg:grid-cols-12 + md:col-span-7 → lg:col-span-7; boot-log terminal panel anchored with left:clamp(48px,6vw,96px) so it never overlaps typewriter at 768-900px

AboutSection / SkillsSection / ExperienceSection / ContactSection: giant section-number background text-[10rem] / lg:text-[14rem] replaced with fontSize: clamp(6rem,12vw,14rem) — never overflows HudFrame right padding at 768-1023px
ContactSection: ping-rings SVG hardcoded width=420/height=420 replaced with w-full max-w-md aspect-square + viewBox + preserveAspectRatio (no longer clips at 375px)

ExperienceSection: minHeight 150vh → 150svh; .exp-bullet now flex min-w-0 with break-words text span; .exp-period now flex-wrap with tighter tracking on small viewports (sm:tracking-[0.32em]); rail rail padding pl-[70px] → pl-[44px] sm:pl-[70px] for narrow viewports
SectionHUD: mobile strip top-10 → top-14 (clears HudFrame top labels at 375/414px)

HeroWarrior: TechChips left:-2% / right:-2% → left:2% / right:2% so they live inside the column at md viewport; StatBars + CoordReadout hidden on <lg (only visible where the warrior actually has space)
HudFrame: DEV.OS chip + UTC clock decorative labels hidden on <=768px (md:flex); kept on md+; LAT/LON / SID already md+ only
SectionFrame: !bare default min-h-screen → min-h-[100svh] for iOS Safari address-bar handling — applies to Hero / About / Contact
globals.css: html, body { overflow-x: clip } with hidden fallback; prevents rogue horizontal scroll from -inset rings, translated chips, or oversized number BG text
ProjectVisuals: every SVG className now block aspect-square h-full max-h-full w-full max-w-full + preserveAspectRatio xMidYMid meet — no overflow at any viewport
summary: Phase 5 responsive sweep complete. All eight critical findings addressed (pinned stage 1024-1279 fallback verified, hero warrior gated to lg+, section number BG text fluid-clamped, boot-log left-anchored, mobile HUD strip moved below frame labels, ping rings now fluid, exp bullets break-word + slimmer rail padding on mobile, TechChips inset-corrected and hero stat overlays gated to lg+). All min-h-screen / minHeight: 100vh switched to 100svh for iOS Safari URL-bar safety. body { overflow-x: clip } added to globals.css to neutralize any rogue horizontal scroll. typecheck OK, build OK (203kB / 342kB First Load JS unchanged).
